comment: The new features are the WORST. I have been using this app for last 3 years but I literally uninstalled this app. The update removed all the basic features like shuffle, I can't add to queue, I can't tap on the lyrics i.e I can't listen to the specific part of the song, I can't repeat the song. This updates are worst. If Spotify is doing this for just "PROFITS" then it's not beneficial for you because you are already losing your customer base, you're losing the youth population basically.
key sentence: the new features, shuffle, add to queue, tap on the lyrics, repeat the song
the function of activity: The activity involves searching, library function, playing/pausing items, viewing downloaded songs/podcasts, downloading songs or podcasts, adding to playlists, shuffling a playlist, connecting to devices, previewing episodes, type replies to episodes and accessing history page, setting page
